title: In asking Pardon
fullText:
أَللَّهُمَّ إنِّي أَعْتَـذِرُ إلَيْـكَ

O God, I ask pardon from Thee for

مِنْ مَـظْلُوم ظُلِمَ بِحَضْرَتِي فَلَمْ أَنْصُرْهُ،

the person wronged in my presence whom I did not help,

وَمِنْ مَعْرُوف أُسْدِيَ إلَيَّ فَلَمْ أَشْكُرْهُ،

the favour conferred upon me for which I returned no thanks,

وَمِنْ مُسِيء أعْتَذَرَ إلَيَّ فَلَمْ أَعْذِرْهُ،

the evildoer who asked pardon from me and whom I did not pardon,

وَمِنْ ذِيْ فَاقَة سَأَلَنِي فَلَمْ اُوثِرْهُ،

the needy person who asked from me and whom I preferred not over myself,

وَمِنْ حَقِّ ذي حَقٍّ لَزِمَنِي لِمُؤْمِن فَلَمْ أوَفِّـرْهُ،

the right of a believer who possesses a right incumbent upon me which I did not fulfil,

وَمِنْ عَيْبِ مُؤْمِن ظَهَر لِي فَلَمْ أَسْتُرْهُ،

the fault of a believer which became evident to me and which I did not conceal,

وَمِنْ كُلِّ إثْم عَرَضَ لِيْ فَلَمْ أَهْجُرْهُ.

and every sin which presented itself to me and which I failed to avoid.

أَعْتَذِرُ إلَيْكَ يَا إلهِي مِنْهُنَّ

I ask pardon, my God, for all of these

وَمِنْ نَظَائِرِهِنَّ اعْتِذَارَ نَدَامَة

and their likes, with an asking of pardon in remorse

يَكُونُ وَاعِظاً لِمَا بَيْنَ يَدَيَّ مِنْ أَشْبَاهِهِنَّ.

which may act as an admonisher against similar things ahead of me.

فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ

So bless Muhammad and his Household

وَاجْعَلْ نَدَامَتِي عَلَى مَا وَقَعْتُ فِيهِ مِنَ الـزَّلاّتِ

and make my remorse for the slips into which I have fallen

وَعَزْمِي عَلَى تَـرْكِ مَا يَعْـرِضُ لِيْ مِنَ السَّيِّئـاتِ

and my determination to refrain from the evil deeds which present themselves to me

تَوبَةً تُوجِبُ لِيْ مَحَبَّتَـكَ

a repentance which will make Thy love for me obligatory,

يا مُحِبَّ التَّوَّابِيْنَ.

O lover of those who repent!

lines.text: أَللَّهُمَّ إنِّي أَعْتَـذِرُ إلَيْـكَ
O God, I ask pardon from Thee for
مِنْ مَـظْلُوم ظُلِمَ بِحَضْرَتِي فَلَمْ أَنْصُرْهُ،
the person wronged in my presence whom I did not help,
وَمِنْ مَعْرُوف أُسْدِيَ إلَيَّ فَلَمْ أَشْكُرْهُ،
the favour conferred upon me for which I returned no thanks,
وَمِنْ مُسِيء أعْتَذَرَ إلَيَّ فَلَمْ أَعْذِرْهُ،
the evildoer who asked pardon from me and whom I did not pardon,
وَمِنْ ذِيْ فَاقَة سَأَلَنِي فَلَمْ اُوثِرْهُ،
the needy person who asked from me and whom I preferred not over myself,
وَمِنْ حَقِّ ذي حَقٍّ لَزِمَنِي لِمُؤْمِن فَلَمْ أوَفِّـرْهُ،
the right of a believer who possesses a right incumbent upon me which I did not fulfil,
وَمِنْ عَيْبِ مُؤْمِن ظَهَر لِي فَلَمْ أَسْتُرْهُ،
the fault of a believer which became evident to me and which I did not conceal,
وَمِنْ كُلِّ إثْم عَرَضَ لِيْ فَلَمْ أَهْجُرْهُ.
and every sin which presented itself to me and which I failed to avoid.
أَعْتَذِرُ إلَيْكَ يَا إلهِي مِنْهُنَّ
I ask pardon, my God, for all of these
وَمِنْ نَظَائِرِهِنَّ اعْتِذَارَ نَدَامَة
and their likes, with an asking of pardon in remorse
يَكُونُ وَاعِظاً لِمَا بَيْنَ يَدَيَّ مِنْ أَشْبَاهِهِنَّ.
which may act as an admonisher against similar things ahead of me.
فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ
So bless Muhammad and his Household
وَاجْعَلْ نَدَامَتِي عَلَى مَا وَقَعْتُ فِيهِ مِنَ الـزَّلاّتِ
and make my remorse for the slips into which I have fallen
وَعَزْمِي عَلَى تَـرْكِ مَا يَعْـرِضُ لِيْ مِنَ السَّيِّئـاتِ
and my determination to refrain from the evil deeds which present themselves to me
تَوبَةً تُوجِبُ لِيْ مَحَبَّتَـكَ
a repentance which will make Thy love for me obligatory,
يا مُحِبَّ التَّوَّابِيْنَ.
O lover of those who repent!

translations.text: O God, I ask pardon from Thee for

pairs.arabic: مِنْ مَـظْلُوم ظُلِمَ بِحَضْرَتِي فَلَمْ أَنْصُرْهُ،

translations.text: the person wronged in my presence whom I did not help,

pairs.arabic: وَمِنْ مَعْرُوف أُسْدِيَ إلَيَّ فَلَمْ أَشْكُرْهُ،

translations.text: the favour conferred upon me for which I returned no thanks,

pairs.arabic: وَمِنْ مُسِيء أعْتَذَرَ إلَيَّ فَلَمْ أَعْذِرْهُ،

translations.text: the evildoer who asked pardon from me and whom I did not pardon,

pairs.arabic: وَمِنْ ذِيْ فَاقَة سَأَلَنِي فَلَمْ اُوثِرْهُ،

translations.text: the needy person who asked from me and whom I preferred not over myself,

pairs.arabic: وَمِنْ حَقِّ ذي حَقٍّ لَزِمَنِي لِمُؤْمِن فَلَمْ أوَفِّـرْهُ،

translations.text: the right of a believer who possesses a right incumbent upon me which I did not fulfil,

pairs.arabic: وَمِنْ عَيْبِ مُؤْمِن ظَهَر لِي فَلَمْ أَسْتُرْهُ،

translations.text: the fault of a believer which became evident to me and which I did not conceal,

pairs.arabic: وَمِنْ كُلِّ إثْم عَرَضَ لِيْ فَلَمْ أَهْجُرْهُ.

translations.text: and every sin which presented itself to me and which I failed to avoid.
I ask pardon, my God, for all of these
and their likes, with an asking of pardon in remorse

pairs.arabic: يَكُونُ وَاعِظاً لِمَا بَيْنَ يَدَيَّ مِنْ أَشْبَاهِهِنَّ.

translations.text: which may act as an admonisher against similar things ahead of me.
So bless Muhammad and his Household

pairs.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ نَدَامَتِي عَلَى مَا وَقَعْتُ فِيهِ مِنَ الـزَّلاّتِ

translations.text: and make my remorse for the slips into which I have fallen

pairs.arabic: وَعَزْمِي عَلَى تَـرْكِ مَا يَعْـرِضُ لِيْ مِنَ السَّيِّئـاتِ

translations.text: and my determination to refrain from the evil deeds which present themselves to me
a repentance which will make Thy love for me obligatory,
O lover of those who repent!
